data.title: Scholastic Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: The board has approved a $200 million modified Dutch auction tender offer as part of a total $300 million share repurchase authorization. The company has set a long-term net leverage target between 2.0-2.5 times adjusted EBITDA, aligning with its disciplined strategy for managing the balance sheet.

data.title: ALTA Good Deeds Foundation Awards $126,000 to Support 21 Local Nonprofits Nationwide
data.description: On March 19, 2026, the Good Deeds Foundation, established by the American Land Title Association (ALTA), a leading national trade association in the title insurance sector, revealed that they have distributed $126,000 in grants to 21 nonprofit organizations. The Good Deeds Foundation is a registered 501(c)(3) charitable entity created by ALTA to support charitable causes.

data.title: Ziegler Closes $30,000,000 Financing for Butterfield Trail Village
data.description: Specialty investment bank Ziegler has recently closed a successful transaction in Chicago on March 19, 2026, involving a $30,000,000 tax-exempt fixed rate bond issue for Butterfield Trail Village, Inc. (BTV). This bond issue, dubbed the "Series 2026 Bonds," was finalized through The...

data.title: Hagens Berman Sobol Shapiro LLP, Handley Farah & Anderson PLLC, and Cohen Milstein Sellers & Toll PLLC Announce $202.7 Million in Settlements for Beef and Pork Processing Plant Workers
data.description: Employees at beef and pork processing plants may receive compensation from a total of $202.7 million in settlements. This news comes from law firms Hagens Berman Sobol Shapiro LLP, Handley Farah & Anderson PLLC, and is dated March 19, 2026.

data.title: Curis Provides Fourth Quarter 2025 Business Update
data.description: The company's management will be conducting a conference call today at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. On March 19, 2026, in LEXINGTON, Massachusetts, Curis, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRIS), a biotech firm concentrating on the advancement of emavusertib (CA-4948), an orally accessible, small molecule targeting IRAK4 and FLT3, announced its latest updates.

data.title: Hammes breaks ground on expansion at Specialists Hospital Shreveport to enhance access to advanced spine and orthopedic care
data.description: In Milwaukee, Wisconsin on March 19, 2026, Hammes, a prominent real estate consulting, development, investment, and management company, marked the commencement of an expansion initiative at Specialists Hospital Shreveport. This hospital, owned by physicians and focused on surgical services, is set to undergo significant growth.

data.title: Inhibrx Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Inhibrx Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: INBX) released its financial outcomes for Q4 and the fiscal year 2025. The company concluded the sale of INBRX-101 (referred to as the "101 Transaction") by Inhibrx, Inc., marking a significant development in their operations.

data.title: RethinkCare Unveils Major Enhancements to Support Neurodivergent and Disabled Communities
data.description: A new and improved service is now available to provide comprehensive support for neurodivergent and disabled individuals in the workplace. This enhanced offering combines human assistance with digital tools to address the longstanding deficiencies in benefits for these communities. Launched in New York on March 19, 2026, by RethinkCare, the leading platform for neurodiversity and disability, this initiative aims to bridge critical gaps in workplace support. The coordinated approach is designed to cater to the unique needs of neurodivergent and disabled individuals, offering specialized assistance and resources. This groundbreaking service seeks to revolutionize workplace benefits by providing tailored support to those who often face exclusion and barriers in traditional work environments.

data.title: Origin Announces HP Embalagens as Strategic Distributor for Sustainable PET Bottlecaps
data.description: A technology company, Origin Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ: ORGN, ORGNW), based in West Sacramento, California, unveiled a significant partnership with HP Embalagens, a renowned leader in high-performance thermoformed packaging based in São Paulo. The collaboration entails HP Embalagens procuring PET bottlecaps from Origin Materials to supply its clientele network, anticipating multiple global clients. This strategic distributor relationship emphasizes the sustainable transition initiative epicentered on offering eco-friendly alternatives in the form of PET caps to a broader market.

data.title: Screencastify Evolves into Castify: High-Impact Video Content that Sticks for your Organization
data.description: Castify has introduced a new all-in-one platform with the debut of "Transform," an innovative AI agent capable of converting videos into documents instantly with a single click. The company, formerly known as Screencastify, has rebranded and expanded its offerings to tackle contemporary challenges. The launch took place in Chicago on March 19, 2026.
Total money market fund assets rose by $38.68b to $7.86t for the week ended March 18th - ICI.

data.title: Royer Labs Acquired by Sounds Great Holdings, Marking New Chapter for Leading Ribbon Microphone Manufacturer
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Royer Labs, a prominent producer of ribbon microphones widely utilized in recording, broadcast, live sound, and film production, revealed its purchase by Sounds Great Holdings, LLC. This acquisition signifies a fresh chapter of expansion for the company.

data.title: Former CrowdStrike Leaders Introduce Bltz AI, the Agentic Defensive Security Platform for Safe AI Adoption
data.description: Bltz AI has launched a pioneering form of self-healing, agentic AI security that proactively addresses and resolves threats in real time. This innovative technology marks a shift in AI security from reactive measures to a seamless, automated approach. The announcement was made in San Diego on March 19, 2026. The solution aims to revolutionize the cybersecurity landscape by providing continuous protection and swift resolution of risks. This advancement comes at a crucial time as organizations worldwide are rapidly embracing cutting-edge security measures.

data.title: XRP treasury firm Evernorth nears public listing, boasting $685M stash & set to go public with over 473M XRP.
data.description: Evernorth is gearing up to establish itself as the leading publicly traded XRP treasury firm, set to commence operations with over 473 million XRP in its holdings.

data.title: Colossal's Nationwide Jr. Ranger Competition Gives Young Explorers the Opportunity to Win $20,000 and Explore Wildlife with Jeff Corwin, While Supporting the National Wildlife Federation
data.description: A current initiative is underway to safeguard wildlife and encourage the younger generation to appreciate and conserve the environment. In a press release dated March 19, 2026, in Phoenix, Colossal, the prominent fundraising organization specializing in online competitions with a cause, is spearheading the effort. The campaign aims to raise awareness and funds for wildlife conservation and environmental education.

data.title: Bybit introduces yield-bearing tokenized gold product with XAUT, enhancing RWA yield market.
data.description: A cryptocurrency exchange has introduced a new yield product linked to Tether Gold (XAUT), highlighting a transition towards converting typically static assets such as gold into items that generate income.

data.title: Alberta Utilities Collaborating to Reduce Wildfire Risk and Increase Resilience
data.description: Three electric utilities in Alberta are collaborating to provide secure electricity during wildfire season. The Government of Alberta's Alberta Wildfire Mitigation Strategy emphasizes the crucial role utilities play in mitigating wildfires. As wildfires increase in frequency and intensity, the owners and operators of electric networks in Alberta face significant challenges.
